sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60194" key="kroupezofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρουπεζο-φόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n60194.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wearing wooden shoes</tr_>, of the Boeotians, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:310" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">310</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
